channel.title: Download free software, update daily!
channel.description: Taiwebs.com - Download free software applications, full version, latest updates!

item.title: Download FFmpeg 8.1
item.description: FFmpeg is an open and open-source software project, consisting of a large set of libraries and programs for handling videos, sounds as well as files and multimedia streams. It is a free software consisting of a giant suite of libraries and programs for video processing, audio, multimedia files and streams. Its core is the FFmpeg program itself, which is designed to handle videos and audio based on the command line and is widely used for switching formats, basic editing (cutting and...

item.title: Download SecretDNS 3.8.7
item.description: SecretDNS provides a quick means to deploy DNS over HTPS, meaning it allows DNS (short for Domain Name Server) resolution to be performed remotely using the HTTPS protocol to encrypts data between the client and the DNS resolver. Its purpose, obviously, is related to data security and user privacy, to prevent unauthorized interception and manipulation of DNS data. Default DNS settings in SecretDNS use CloudFlare to ensure security. You can change DNS configuration in the dedicated tab...

item.title: Download HTTP Toolkit 1.25.0
item.description: HTTP Toolkit is software that provides the ability to automatically block HTTP and HTTPS traffic from most client applications, including web browsers such as Chrome and Firefox, most CLI tools and auxiliary languages such as Node.js, Python, Ruby etc. You can browse through traffic by marking the content type, status, and source or search by URL, status, and title to find important notifications. You can check the URL, status, title, and content of each request or feedback, along with...

item.title: Download DP Animation Maker 3.5.48
item.description: DP Animation Maker - 2D animation software smart allows you to turn static images into motion directly. The world is a living, breathing from your still images with minimal effort. DP Animation Maker lets you make natural scenes burst with vibrancy and bring out the motion to people and objects. DP Animation Maker - Create and edit animated GIF Animation Maker has the tools rich that you need to put all the pieces together. When you select pictures of yourself, it's easy to move from...

item.title: Download ExtraMAME 26.3
item.description: ExtraMAME is a simple tool that allows simulation of the arcade game from the most popular platform but is long forgotten, thanks to which the game industry has reached the current level. After launch, you will get 11 games pre-installed, among which are: Super Mario Bros, Pac-Man Plus, Space Invaders II and other games. The simulation of multiple machine arcade is authored by Nicola Salmoria and team MAME. MAME lets you play thousands of arcade game old school on your computer. ExtraMAME...

item.title: Download Adobe Air 51.3.1.2
item.description: Adobe Air is an integrated solution from Adobe to build applications independent of the browser. Using air, developers can write applications of their own in many different languages such as html, javascript, flash , flex, and ... and not have to worry about deployment platform, their program can be installed on any operating system which can install air. The face, too. Because the program is not related to the binding of the browser, it works more independent and it can do things that web...

item.title: Download QueueExplorer Professional 5.0.74
item.description: QueueExplorer is a tool indispensable to work with queues and messages: understand and manage your system, find the error and fix it. Or you can use QueueExplorer to sort them by any field available. Because of the sort display the messages in another order with them will be handled, QueueExplorer more columns of Ms Ms # # so you can still see what is processed first. The features of QueueExplorer Move, copy or delete messages Messages can be handled the same as in process explorer,...

item.title: Download ParkControl Pro 5.5.3.4
item.description: ParkControl Pro is free software to display and adjust CPU core settings in real time. It also has a bunch of free power automation features. Core Parking automatically disables CPU cores to save power when idle. Disabled cores are re-enabled as CPU load once again increases. This technology is very similar to frequency scaling, in that it seeks to throttle the CPU when idle. These tweaks are completely safe for any properly configured PC. The only way they seem to be able to cause some...

item.title: Download RepairKit 1.4.0
item.description: RepairKit is an all-in-one Java-based Windows repair and maintenance toolkit. RepairKit aims to provide a package that provides users with a dedicated system repair tool as well as quick access to some operating system features and some other PC maintenance software that comes with it. it. If you want to keep your PC running smoothly and want to do it conveniently, RepairKit offers a simple and effective solution for that, with an automatic repair/cleanup module , as well as access to...

item.title: Download AI Image Background Remover Pro 1.1.1
item.description: Easily remove image backgrounds with pixel-perfect precision with AI Image Background Remover Pro. Designed for e-commerce sellers, graphic designers, photographers, and social media managers, this powerful desktop tool gives you complete control over your creative process. Unlike online tools, AI Image Background Remover Pro works 100% offline on your computer, keeping your images and projects completely private and secure. No uploads, no data collection, and no registration...

item.title: Download Gilisoft Copy Protect 8.5.0
item.description: Gilisoft Copy Protect is software that helps you protect audio, video, PDF, DOC, PPT, XLS and image files so that they cannot be copied or distributed by illegal means. Users can play from, video encoded on macOS, android using Gilisoft's GCP reader. Features of Gilisoft Copy Protect A document security tool that creates shareless GCP files to protect your Video, Photo, DOC, PDF, XLS, PPT files from unauthorized sharing, editing, copying or viewing . Protect document files from...

item.title: Download UniGetUI 2026.1.1
item.description: UniGetUI (formerly WingetUI) is a graphical user interface for WinGet (and other package managers), a command-line package manager for Windows 10 and Windows 11 such as Winget, Scoop, Chocolatey, Pip, NPM, .NET Tool and PowerShell Gallery. It allows users to install, update and uninstall software from the package manager easily. Additionally, it provides features like backup, restore, group and update your packages and receive notifications about new updates. With this program, you can...

item.title: Download Gpg4win 5.0.2
item.description: Gpg4win is a security software program that can encrypt and attach digital signatures to your emails and files when you upload or send them online, to prevent people from unauthorized use of your personal information. Gpg4win allows users to securely transmit emails and files with the help of encryption and digital signatures. Encryption protects content from an unwanted party reading it. A digital signature ensures that it has not been modified and comes from a specific sender. The...

item.title: Download Devious Machines Duck 2.0.24
item.description: Devious Machines Duck is a dynamic processor plugin designed to control the volume of a track or a specific audio signal in a mix. It is often used for "ducking" effects, where one sound source automatically lowers the volume when another source is present. Ducking is often used in music production and audio post-production to create space in a mix, emphasize certain elements, or prevent frequencies from clashing. Duck has a sidechain input that allows you to trigger volume reduction...

item.title: Download ASDIP Wood 4.0.0.4
item.description: ASDIP Wood is structural engineering software used by engineers to design wood elements, such as biaxial columns, continuous beams, and out-of-plane shear walls. This structural design software is based on the latest NDS regulations. Load combination according to ASCE 7 and CSA A23.3. ASDIP WOOD significantly simplifies time-consuming calculations for structural engineering design. Main benefits of ASDIP Wood Quickly model your specific parts using a simple and efficient graphical...

item.title: Download MiniMeters 1.0.28.233
item.description: MiniMeters is a simple standalone sound meter application for Windows. Monitor your System Audio*, Any Input, or insert the MiniMeter Server Plug-in (VST3/AU/CLAP) at the end of your main channel in the DAW of your choice. Customize the layout in a horizontal bar (perfect for above or below the audio engine of your choice) or pop out into modules to create custom layouts. Features of MiniMeters 6 modules to choose from to build your perfect metering setup: Spectrogram, Waveform,...

item.title: Download Youtube Downloader HD 5.9.9.10
item.description: Youtube Downloader HD is the best application to download and save Youtube videos. And it's completely free :) You can also convert the downloaded video into various formats easily. Youtube Downloader HD is the download at video free. Download at your videos easily and convert to AVI video format or into MP4 video format (compatible with iPad, iPhone). You can download high quality videos, high definition videos and Full HD from YouTube. Youtube Downloader HD - Download Youtube videos...

item.title: Download ASDIP Steel 6.5.4.4
item.description: ASDIP Steel, formerly known as ASDIP Structural Steel, is software to design the steel texture, including steel and composite plates, beams and columns, and other related components. The software is produced based on the latest build code with the number of AISC 360 and experts can fully trust the software's calculations and suggestions. Using this program allows engineers to perform the necessary calculations with high speed and accuracy and minimize possible error rates. This program...

item.title: Download LizardSystems Terminal Services Manager 26.03.16
item.description: LizardSystems Terminal Services Manager is a service manager that says what users are connected to the remote server, what process they are running and the amount of server resources (CPU and memory) they are using. You can send messages to users, disconnect them from the server or connect remotely with their sessions. The features of LizardSystems Terminal Services Manager View the user, session and process running on the remote server Monitoring the resource use of the remote...

item.title: Download Executor 2.2.7
item.description: Executor for windows is a software alternative premium customization features for the Windows "Run" and "Search Programs". When you press WIN + Z and provides the search results instant, as-you-type for any keywords you enter. By default, Executor will index all the Desktop and Start Menu and you can easily expand the search range by adding the folder location additional. Executor for windows The program comes with a list of commands built in which you can use to quickly access many...

item.title: Download KORG TRITON 1.4.5
item.description: The engine sound synthesizer KORG TRITON was first released in 1999 to receive prizes and prestigious awards. The top musicians in the world love the sound PCM expressive and use the TRITON for their countless songs. KORG TRITON comes with two types of filters, five effects inserts, two effects on the main and EQ main, as well as the combined mode allows the maximum of eight part time. KORG TRITON - sound engine Moreover, the KORG Collection TRITON fully reproduce synthesis system the...

item.title: Download Symless Synergy Business 3.6.0
item.description: Symless Synergy Business is the enterprise version of Synergy software from Symless, designed to share a keyboard and mouse across multiple computers on a local network. It offers maximum stability, security features such as TLS/SSL encryption, and compatibility with enterprise environments, used by 26% of Fortune 1000 companies, including Google and Amazon. Key Features: Instant mouse/keyboard switching with no hardware KVM latency, plus clipboard sharing on Windows, macOS, and...

item.title: Download HDD Raw Copy Tool 2.2
item.description: HDD Raw Copy Tool is software that creates exact copies of SATA, IDE, SAS, SCSI or SSD hard drives. It can create sector-by-sector copies of all sectors of the hard drive (MBR, boot record, all partitions as well as the space in between). Additionally, HDD Raw Copy Tool can create accurate raw (dd) or compressed images of the entire media (including service data such as MBR, Boot Record, etc.). Features of HDD Raw Copy Tool Data recovery: make a copy of the damaged drive to attempt...

item.title: Download Coder Technologies Coder 2.30.4
item.description: Coder OSS Enterprise is a development platform that provides a complete cloud-based solution for software development, testing and deployment. It is designed to simplify the software development process by providing developers with a collaborative and streamlined environment. Coder offloads development from local workstations to your on-premises infrastructure and public cloud. Boost developer productivity with powerful server resources and instant integration. Keep the code and data...
